text: Pain isn't a straight shot to your brain. It's the spinal cord that holds the key to what you feel. This is known as the gate control theory of pain. When you rub a sore spot, you're activating nerve fibers that can block pain signals. So, that simple act of rubbing can literally turn down the volume on pain. Like this? Hit follow for more surprising science!
